scenarios.user_content: Hello! How are you doing today?
Thanks, that completely fixed my issue!
Good morning! Is there anything I should know before I start work?
I appreciate all your help, talk to you later.
Hey, just wanted to say things are running great now.
Can you say that again more clearly?
Never mind, I figured it out myself.
You were very helpful earlier, thanks a lot.
OK got it, bye for now!
That was exactly what I was looking for, cheers.
What is the capital city of Japan?
How far is the Moon from the Earth on average?
Who invented the telephone?
What does RAM stand for in computing?
Can you explain what SMART stands for in the context of hard drives?
What is the difference between a process and a thread?
Which programming language was Rust inspired by?
Explain the OSI model in simple terms.
What is the difference between SSD and HDD storage?
How does TCP handshake work?
My computer feels slow lately, what could be causing that?
Something seems off with my network but I am not sure what.
Can you help me understand why my PC might be crashing?
I want to monitor my system but I do not know where to start.
Is there a way to improve the performance of my machine in general?
I keep seeing errors but I am not sure if they are disk or network related.
My USB device stopped working after an update, any ideas?
Sometimes services seem to hang, is that normal?
The fan is running loud, does that tell you anything?
I think something is using too much CPU but I am not certain which program.
Get disk usage statistics for all mounted volumes
Fetch the current network throughput in bytes per second
List all USB hubs connected to my system
Run a full hardware health check and email me the results
Diagnose why my Bluetooth adapter is not showing up
Start the Windows Update service and check for pending patches
Check if my GPU temperature is within safe limits
Show me a breakdown of memory usage per application
Reboot the machine and send me a confirmation when it comes back up
Tell me the BIOS version and check if a firmware update is available online
